MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Vlasak (415-835-6777) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Fernando Bueno.
John Park Jennings (650-989-5400) for Cross-Defendant Tom Jue & Co.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs HAWK LOU, KETTY LOU, HAWK LOU, HAWK LOU's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Complaint Of Plaintiff, Alicia E. Hasper, Dba Alicia E. Hasper, Lac. is DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to the enforceability of the exculpatory provision of the lease under the circumstances of the Lease. See CC 1668, Capri v. L.A Fitness Intern., LLC (2006) 136 Cal.App.4th 1078 and Hanna v. Lederman (1963) 223 Cal.App.2d 786; Moving party's fact 3; Additional Disputed Material Facts 1, 2, 4, 6, 7 etc. The Court notes that Defendant failed to properly file its reply. The reply submitted for filing has not been properly signed and no more attempts were made to submit a properly signed reply for filing. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEFENDANTs HAWK LOU, KETTY LOU, HAWK LOU, HAWK LOU's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT As To Property Damage Claims Of Plaintiff Aracelli Espinoza, An Individual, Dba Thalias Jewelry is DENIED. L.A Fitness Intern., LLC (2006) 136 Cal.App.4th 1078 and Hanna v. Lederman (1963) 223 Cal.App.2d 786; Moving party's fact 3; Additional Disputed Material Facts 1, 2, 4, 6, 7 etc. The Court notes that Defendant failed to properly file its reply. The reply submitted for filing has not been properly signed and no more attempts were made to submit a properly signed reply for filing. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
